title: Nowdab #5114
definition:
Nodab = "nobility"

 1) an Arab tribe probably descended from Nodab, son of Ishmael and
    grandson of Abraham
nasbUsage:

 1) an Arab tribe probably descended from Nodab, son of Ishmael and
    grandson of Abraham

    NASB:  an Arab tribe
